name: Chocolate Cake Doughnuts
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the sugar and eggs together until creamy and lemon colored.
2. Melt the butter and chocolate in a small saucepan over low heat, then beat into the sugar and egg mixture.
3. Combine the vanilla with buttermilk and stir into the sugar mixture.
4. In a large bowl, combine flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
5. Stir this dry mixture into the liquid dough.
6. Chill the dough slightly to make it easier to handle.
7. Roll out half the dough on a lightly floured board until it is about 1/2 inch thick.
8. Cut into doughnut shapes.
9. Allow cut doughnuts to air dry for 10 minutes before frying.
10. Heat oil in a large skillet to 370°F (190°C).
11. Dip the metal pancake turner into hot oil each time before handling or turning a doughnut.
12. Transfer doughnuts one at a time, every 15 seconds, to the skillet.
13. Fry each side for about 90 seconds.
14. Remove from oil and drain on paper toweling.
